title: Web developer
description: Since I started nearing the end of my education I have been actively doing and looking for small time freelancing to gain some experience.

title: Graphic designer
description: To expand and diversify my skillset I started self-learning graphic design for social media by making graphics for a few teams within the sim racing scene.

title: Full-stack developer
description: Developing a Progressive Web Application with Next.js, PHP, JSX, CSS, AWS S3, Stripe and MySQL. Worked in GitHub with merging and fetch requests within multiple branches. I also created the company's AWS S3-implementation and then carried out my own 4 day course with the team to teach them how it is used.

title: Web Developer
description: Developed a custom website from the ground up for a race team called Team PGZ to enhance the team's online presence. Created the teams identity and design style as this was their first website. The website presents the team to around 1.3-1.5k visitors a month.
